category_sources: source_facts.description says wtf translates common Internet acronyms; NetBSD manual describes wtf as a term lookup utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives wtf; NetBSD manual page title is wtf(6).
docs_sources: Official NetBSD manual page documents wtf usage; source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge distribution page for the packaged bsd-wtf mirror.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is a SourceForge distribution page, not a source-control repository; no official standalone source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Translate common Internet acronyms; NetBSD manual says wtf looks up terms and acronym databases; current_curation.tags includes cli.
